memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-13 — Huang/Beijing catalyst + AVGO confirmation

- PHLX fell 3-6.8% on Tuesday May 12 (largest intraday drop in over a year). Qualcomm -11%. No portfolio stops hit.
- **AVGO CONFIRMED FILLED:** May 12 daily range $408.41-$429.34. GTC bracket at $418.59 definitively executed. OCO children (stop $368.36, target $519.05) active.
- **MASSIVE CATALYST:** Jensen Huang personally called by Trump and joined China delegation. Flying on Air Force One to Beijing for H200/H20 chip export negotiations. Chinese AI stocks (MiniMax +18%, Zhipu +37%) surging. NVDA +1.5% premarket.
- NEW NVDA add (5sh) scored 8.0 — highest score in portfolio cycle. Fresh catalyst-driven entry. Earnings May 21 (8 days) = valid (>48h).
- **3 MOO orders attempted at 12:52Z** — all blocked HTTP 403 (Host not in allowlist). OPERATOR must place manually before 9:25 AM ET.

### 2026-05-12 — CPI day + China chip deal

- April CPI +3.7% YoY. No Fed rate cuts until 2027.
- AMD MOO (10sh, 7.33) and PLTR MOO (36sh, 7.33) attempted — HTTP 403 again.

### 2026-05-08 — API blocked 3rd consecutive routine

- AMD (7.33) and PLTR (7.33) MOO blocked. BTC re-scored 6.17 (below threshold).

### 2026-05-01 — Operator-mandated deployment bias correction

- Score ≥ 7 = enter at next routine. Only 3 valid skip exemptions.

market.macro_notes_md:
- **PPI (TODAY 8:30 AM ET):** April PPI expected +0.5% MoM. Follows yesterday's hot CPI (+3.7% YoY). NOT a CLAUDE.md exempt binary event.
- **Huang/Beijing summit (DOMINANT CATALYST):** NVDA CEO joining Trump's China delegation (May 14-15). H200/H20 chip export negotiations. Chinese AI stocks +18-37% overnight. NVDA +1.5% premarket. This is the single biggest catalyst of the portfolio cycle.
- **Chip sector Tuesday selloff:** PHLX -3% to -6.8%. Qualcomm -11%. Profit-taking after 70% index rally since March. No portfolio stops hit.
- **AVGO bracket confirmed:** GTC limit at $418.59 executed May 12 during $408-$429 range. OCO children active.
- **Trump-Xi summit (May 14-15):** Top agenda: AI chip export controls, trade, Taiwan, Iran. Huang, Musk, Cook, Fink all attending.
- **Iran/XLE risk:** Beijing summit agenda includes Iran. Any Hormuz deal from summit = XLE downside risk. Stop at $56.15 is resting GTC.
- **BTC:** $80,611 — below $82K entry threshold. Crypto 0% deployed.
- **NVDA earnings May 21:** 8 days. Blackout after May 19 for new entries. Today's 5-share add is valid (>48h).
